chart.title: Share of global forest area
chart.citation: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025)

Share of global forest area.descriptionShort: Share of global forest area represents the proportion of a country's forest area relative to the total global forest area.
Share of global forest area.descriptionProcessing: Annual forest area values are linearly interpolated for missing years, based on available data points from the FAO Forest Resources Assessment (FRA) reports.
Share of global forest area.citationShort: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data
Share of global forest area.citationLong: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data. “Share of global forest area” [dataset]. Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations, “Global Forest Resources Assessment 2025” [original data].
